notes: Pure auto-pipeline noise. Files touched by the 24 auto commits in this window (spot-checked from GHA patterns): docs/data/daily_review.json (from 1fd2aef regen at 07:12Z), docs/data/latest_hash.txt, docs/data/live_data.json, docs/data/status_history.json, docs/tracking.html, latest_hash.txt, monitor_log.txt, status_history.json — same routine set as prior polls. Counterargument for record (per user preference): the 7-day manual-commit drought is the kind of metric that looks alarming in aggregate but is trivially explained by 'author is taking a week off'; we should not over-index on this in isolation. Opposing consideration: the drought is only notable because it coincides with PRED-105's window closing and staying unadjudicated — so the counterargument actually strengthens the finding, because an author-on-break explanation does not explain why the auto-pipeline chooses to canonicalise the silent-ignore rather than raise a flag. Parameter canary check clean across all 6 baselines (disc_radius 20,015 km, H(0) 8,537 km, lambda_g 8,619 km, sun_altitude 5,733 km, moon_altitude 2,534 km, refraction coefficient 0.20); home page still shows Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 / 69 Confirmed Registry Items / 94.5% accuracy; content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection hits across 10 pages).
